title: BorisType Configuration
description: Configuration file for BorisType compiler linking system

linking.description: Linking configuration. Can be either a single package config (name, source, target) or multi-package config (packages array)

name.description: Package name (overrides ws:name from package.json). Used when linking current project as single package

source.description: Source directory path. Defaults to ./build for BorisType packages

target.description: Target path inside dist/. Defaults to ws:root from package.json, then ./wt/{ws:name}

packages.description: Array of child packages to link. If specified, name/source/target are ignored

exclude.description: Additional object types to exclude during pull (added to default exclude list)

name.description: Package name (directory name). System checks ./{name}/package.json for ws:package to determine package type

source.description: Source directory. Defaults to ./{name}/build for BorisType packages, REQUIRED for regular directories

target.description: Target path inside dist/. Defaults to ws:root from package.json, REQUIRED for regular directories
